title: QuarantineReceipt
description: An immutable record of an isolation action applied to a session, process set, unit, or host surface in response to policy drift or observed risk.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

subjectId.description: URN or stable identifier of the session, process, unit, or host surface that was isolated.

triggerType.description: Machine-readable trigger reason, e.g. egress_policy_violation, attest_fail, policy_drift.

isolationMode.description: Isolation mechanism used to enforce the quarantine.

pids.description: Optional process identifiers placed under quarantine control.

cgroup.description: Optional cgroup path associated with the quarantine scope.

unit.description: Optional systemd unit or service identifier associated with the scope.

hostRefs.description: Optional hostnames or device identifiers implicated in the quarantine scope.

scope.description: Optional structured description of what exactly was isolated.

triggerEvidenceRefs.description: References to evidence that caused the quarantine to trigger.

releasedAt.description: Optional ISO 8601 date-time when isolation ended or the subject was released.

outcome.description: Final or current outcome of the quarantine action.

restorationDecisionId.description: Optional URN of the validator decision that authorized release or termination.

receiptHash.description: sha256: prefixed hash of the canonical receipt payload for tamper evidence.
